description: Neonatal thermoregulation evidence for the R2 range (36.8-37.5 C) rests on two 2024 cohorts and one 2025 systematic review. Confidence interval overlap means causal reduction is not claimed. Risk that a future study weakens the case.
mitigation: Monitor evidence log quarterly. Reopen synthesis if a class-A study reports a contradictory finding. Do not claim a causal benefit in R2 language.

description: Long-horizon neonatal infection follow-up beyond 28 days is held open on insufficient evidence. R2 does not claim a benefit or absence of risk in this domain.
mitigation: Carry as a monitored gap. Add to April 6 2027 to April 6 2029 review cycle. Watch EL-0091 and EL-0141 follow-up publications.

description: Two hospital guideline citations (GL-OB-2019-08 clause 4.2 and GL-OB-2021-14 clause 6.1) reference sources superseded by R2 synthesis. Downstream guideline update needed.
mitigation: Flag to guideline maintainers post approval. Not blocking for November 27 2026 decision.

description: Primiparous 90-minute second-stage clarification is a documentation change, not a relaxation. Risk that ward interpretation drifts toward de facto extension of second-stage duration.
mitigation: Reinforce in Module 3 training. Audit second-stage durations in the primiparous water-birth cohort at three, six, and twelve months post go-live.

description: Narrower temperature range (36.8-37.5 C) may increase frequency of documented corrections during second stage. Not a safety concern, may increase documentation load.
mitigation: Covered in Module 2 practical drill. Documentation cadence audited at six months post go-live.

description: Training rollout may collide with seasonal staffing pressure in February 2027 if influenza or RSV increases the sick-leave rate in Cohort B window.
mitigation: Cohort B includes a two-week buffer inside its four-week window. Cohort B midwives may defer one module to Cohort C's overlap week.

description: Recovery day protection may push a small number of Cohort A midwives into make-up slots inside their window.
mitigation: Rota built to respect recovery days without exception. Make-up slots pre-scheduled in each cohort window.

description: Pool B seal replacement biomed sign-off scheduled for November 24 2026. If sign-off slips, Cohort A Modules 5 and 6 cannot proceed on both pools.
mitigation: Fall back to Pool A only for Cohort A Modules 1 through 4. Reschedule Modules 5 and 6 to a later slot in the Cohort A window pending sign-off.

description: Service desk queue and department board diverged on Pool B and thermometer THERM-B status by two-week lag. Process gap, not clinical.
mitigation: Raise with service desk team. Not blocking. Working-group action item working through Q1 2027.

description: Working-group ownership drifted on one action item since spring 2026. Correction reflected in working_group_action_status.md.
mitigation: Confirm ownership at the November 27 2026 meeting. Update Asana and Linear the same day.

description: Bank and pool staff not covered by this rollout. Abbreviated pathway needed post go-live.
mitigation: Abbreviated pathway drafted for post go-live rollout. Tracked separately in working-group action status.

description: Obstetrics side of the department has not seen the delta table before the meeting. Risk of an unaligned discussion.
mitigation: Pre-meeting briefing (olsson_pre_meeting_briefing.md) to be distributed to Dr Henrik Olsson and senior midwives by November 20 2026.
